title: Checkmate
desc: n New York, a CEO, an ex-mobster, a widower and a lawyer get caught up in a mess of power and love when a woman is kidnapped, causing trouble in the city's dark side.

title: Uppum Mulakum
desc: Balachandran and Neelima, who face many challenges to earn a living, aim to successfully fulfil their wish of going to a foreign country.

title: Unni Ganapathi
desc: A devotional retelling of Lord Ganesha's divine journey from his mystical creation to his revered place as the remover of obstacles and symbol of wisdom.

title: Flowers Top Singer 6
desc: Talented singers from all walks of life showcase their vocal abilities with melodious songs overseen by judges to win the grand prize.

title: Mahalakshmi
desc: Mahalakshmi faces the consequences of her stepfather's actions with strength, while Kannan, who survives an unexpected tragedy, becomes her unexpected support in a journey of survival.

title: Sukhamo Devi
desc: Devika is in love with Nandagopan, but Karthikeyan forces her to marry him. She elopes with Nandagopan only to get abandoned by him at the temple, which leads her to marry his friend.

desc: Comedians take the stage and perform hilarious skits, showcasing their talent and attempting to impress the judges, in order to win the competition.

desc: Revisit the best moments of the show 'Flowers Comedy,' where comedians put on their greatest skits and performances for the audience.

title: Flowers Top Singer
desc: Talented young singers compete against each other as they perform on stage in front of a panel of judges to emerge victorious and win the title.

desc: The conflicting perspectives of daughter-in-law and mother-in-law create tensions that lead to frequent arguments and family discord.
